programs.title: Inspector Morse
programs.desc: When tragedy strikes in his own family, Morse's investigation into the death of a bright young girl leads him into an alien world of raves and smart drugs.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The village is put in jeopardy when a kidnapping case takes an unexpected turn.

programs.title: Heartbeat
programs.desc: Drama series. Nick's pursuit of an escaped prisoner leads him into a more complex case, and Greengrass becomes a school lollipop man but his new job is soon put in jeopardy.

programs.title: Midsomer Murders
programs.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate the secretive world of Midsomer's Magic Circle when a magician's assistant drops dead during a show after being poisoned.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: Andy startles Jo by telling her he would like to start trying for a baby. Val returns from her holiday and has some explaining to do when Eric spots a tattoo on her back.

programs.title: Classic Emmerdale
programs.desc: When a friend from Val's holiday arrives in the village, Pollard spies an opportunity to get answers. Donna decides to leave the police and Doug looks forward to Hilary's return.
